metadata.description: {\rtf1\ansi\deff0{\fonttbl{\f0 Helvetica;}} \f0\fs28 MaxPane \u8212? Nested docker layouts for REAPER\line \line \fs22 A native C++ extension that lets you build custom multi-pane workspaces with tabbed windows, drag-and-drop, and instant workspace switching.\line \line \b Features:\b0\line \line \bullet Flexible split layouts (up to 16 panes)\line \bullet Tabbed windows with drag-and-drop between panes\line \bullet 14 known REAPER windows with one-click capture\line \bullet Arbitrary window capture (including ReaImGui scripts)\line \bullet Named workspaces (save/restore complete layouts)\line \bullet Favorites, tab colors, layout presets\line \bullet Per-project state saved inside .RPP files\line \bullet Full state persistence across REAPER restarts\line \bullet Dockable into REAPER's native docker system\line \bullet Zero dependencies \u8212? pure C++ extension\line }

version.author: b451c
version.changelog:
Feature release
- Renamed project: ReDockIt → MaxPane - Diagonal grid lines in empty panes - Fix pane background color for captured windows - Fix DoRelease toggle for Actions window - Fix hint text color on light background

version.author: b451c
version.changelog:
Feature release
- Pane menu button (▼) at the right edge of every tab bar - CalcTabBarLayout shared helper for tab geometry - Targeted InvalidateRect for hover/drag operations - Fix TabHitTest x-bounds regression - Removed scroll arrows for tab overflow

version.author: b451c
version.changelog:
Feature release
- Splitter hover highlights (white bar on mouseover) - Tab hover highlights (lighten effect on mouseover) - Per-project state persistence via RPP files - Fix workspace switch rendering artifacts - Fix frameless floating windows when closing tabs - Fix windows reappearing floating after restart - Improved shutdown lifecycle and quit interception - Simplified to global docker model

version.author: b451c
version.changelog:
Bugfix release
- Fix startup deadlock when REAPER restores docked MaxPane during project load - Code quality improvements: safe_strncpy, unique_ptr, named constants - Debug logging now conditional on Debug build only

version.author: b451c
version.changelog:
Initial release
- Native C++ REAPER extension (no script dependencies) - Binary split tree layout engine with up to 16 panes - Tabbed window management with drag-and-drop - 14 known REAPER windows + arbitrary window capture - Dock frame detection for ReaImGui windows - Named workspaces, favorites, tab colors - 5 built-in layout presets - Auto-open on startup, full state persistence
